entry.title: BEE IT Hand and Body Cream 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: BEE IT
Type: Lotion
Price: 5.90

Moisturizing hand and body cream, soft and scented, exquisite for dry, reddened and in need of attention skin. Enriched with oils, vitamins, propoli and organic honey, it nourishes your skin making it supple, radiant and fragrant. Soft and light like a caress, it removes daily stress and promotes a pleasant feeling of relaxation in every part of your body and mind.

How to use: Use every day after a shower or bath on dry skin. Apply all over the body and massage gently until completely absorbed.

Ingredients: Aqua, Helianthus annuus seed oil, Glyceryl stearate SE, Cetearyl alcohol, Ethylhexyl palmitate, Parfum, Glycerin, Prunus amygdalus dulcis oil, Potassium sorbate, Sodium benzoate, Citric acid, Tocopheryl acetate, Mel*, Propolis, Coumarin, Limonene, Tetrasodium glutamate diacetate, Alpha-isomethyl ionone, Hydroxycitronellal, Linalool, Geraniol, Isoeugenol.

* Organic

Animal Friendly | No Paraffin | No Silicones | No Parabens | 100% Recyclable

“Less plastic is fantastic” packaging is using 70% less plastic compared to a normal bottle pack. Less bulk, being soft and doesn’t break, generates a better recycling chain and allows use of all its contents.

By purchasing BEE IT cosmetics  you contribute to the creation of new bee oasis. 

Made in Italy

entry.title: NAIF Cooling Aftersun 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Suncreen
Price: 13.90

Naïf Cooling After Sun Gel soothes, moisturizes and restores the skin after a sunny day. Aloe Vera provides cooling and regeneration, glycerine for hydration. This keeps even the most sensitive skin soft and supple. Just what the skin needs after exposure to UV rays. Also nice: absorbs quickly and doesn't leave a sticky layer.

How to use: Apply generously after exposure to the sun. Especially on the areas that have had a lot of sun. Repeat if skin still feels dry.

Tip: Keep the gel in the refrigerator, so it is extra cooling.

Ingredients: Aqua/Water, Glycerin, Methylpropanediol, Cetearyl Alcohol, Cetyl Alcohol, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Parfum/Fragrance, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice Powder, Allantoin, Caprylyl Glycol, Phenylpropanol, Xanthan Gum, Lactic Acid, Sodium Hydroxide

All Naïf products are vegan, made with a mild fragrance and dermatologically tested, without the 26 most common allergens. They also do not contain SLES or microplastics. The tubes are made from sugar cane-based bioplastic.

entry.title: HOIA Virgin Goddess Body Whip 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: HOIA
Type: Lotion
Price: 19.90

Virgin Goddess is a whipped body butter, which leaves your skin soft and silky smooth. It is scented with lime and tangerine essential oils and gives your skin a suntouched complexion. Whipped body butter is rich in organic unrefined shea butter, coconut oil, cocoa butter, E-vitamin and a blend of plant based oils, which effectively help to moisturize and soften your skin. This body balm alleviates dry and flaky skin, reduces redness, helps to improve appearance of stretchmarks and the texture and elasticity of your skin.

How to use: Apply it on the skin and massage until it’s absorbed into your skin. Keep the product under +25°C.

Ingredients: *Butyrospermum Parkii (shea) Butter, *Cocos Nucifera (coconut) Oil, *Theobroma Cacao (cocoa) Butter, Helianthus Annuus Seed (sunower) oil, Rubus Ideaus Seed (raspberry) Oil, Tocopherol (E-vitamin), Dunaliella Salina Extract, Citrus Aurantifolia (lime) Peel Oil, Citrus Reticulatar (tangerine) Peel Oil, Eucalyptus Globulus (eucalypt) Leaf Oil, **Citral, **Geraniol, **Linalool, **Limonene, *From organic farming. **Natural component of essential oil.

Handmade in Saaremaa

entry.title: Petit&Jolie Calendula Balm 55ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Petit & Jolie
Type: Lotion
Price: 9.90

Petit & Jolie Calendula Balm has been specially developed for irritated or chapped skin, such as cracked nipples and diaper rash. The organically grown Calendula extract has a restorative and soothing effect.

The balm does not contain perfume and water.

The balm consists of ingredients of 100% natural origin. It does not contain parabens, paraffin and synthetic fragrances and dyes.

How to use: Warm the calendula balm with your fingers. And massage the balm softly on the skin. Repeat as long as needed. 

Ingredients: Ricinus Communis Seed Oil, Helianthus Annuus Hybrid Oil *, Cocoglycerides, Hydrogenated Vegetable Oil, Decyl Oleate, Cera Alba, Polyglyceryl-2 Dipolyhydroxystearate, Calendula Officinalis Flower Extract *, Daucus Carota Sativa Root Extract *, Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Extract *, Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil, Capsicum Annuum Extract *, Lithospermum Erytrorhizom Root Extract, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Tocopherol.

* from organic source

entry.title: Petit&Jolie Body Lotion 150ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Petit & Jolie
Type: Lotion
Price: 10.50

Petit&Jolie Body Lotion is a nourishing and moisturizing lotion especially designed for the fragile and sensitive skin of your baby. The apricot oil provides extra elasticity and a long-lasting ultra-soft skin. The body lotion is easy to spread and is quickly absorbed.

The body lotion is 100% from natural ingredients, so it contains no parabens, paraffin or synthetic fragrances and dyes.

How to use: Gently massage on baby's skin after washing

Ingredients: Aqua (Water), Helianthus Annuus (sunflower) Hybrid Oil*, Decyl Oleate, Glycerin, Prunus Armeniaca (apricot) Kernel Oil, Pentylene Glycol, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Glyceryl Caprylate, Hippophae Rhamnoides (sea buckthorn) Fruit Extract*, Chamomilla Recutita (camomile) Flower  Extrakt*, Schizandra Sphenanthera (schisandra) Fruit Extract, Rosmarinus Officinalis (rosemary)  Leaf Extract, Salvia Officinalis (sage) Leaf Extract, Helianthus Annuus (sunflower) Seed Oil, Tocopherol, Sodium Phytate, Oryzanol, Xanthan Gum, Parfum*

* organic source

**natural essential oils

entry.title: Petit&Jolie Diaper Cream 75ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Petit & Jolie
Type: Lotion
Price: 8.90

Petit&Jolie Diaper Cream protects, restores and nourishes the skin around the diaper area. It cares for and protects the sensitive baby skin. The buttocks cream with, among other things, beeswax provides an extra layer of protection against moisture on the buttocks. The zinc oxide present has a drying effect. The unique composition of natural ingredients soothes the skin and prevents diaper rash. It makes the skin silky soft again.

The diaper cream is perfume free and is made from 100% natural ingredients, so it contains no parabens, paraffin or synthetic fragrances and dyes.

How to use: Apply after changing diapers

Ingredients: Aqua, Decyl Oleate, Helianthus Annuus Hybrid Oil*, Sesamum Indicum Seed Oil*, Zinc Oxide, Polyglyceryl-3 Polyricinoleate, Cera Alba*, Cetyl Ricinoleate, Sorbitan Sesquioleate, Lanolin, Magnesiumsulfate, Zinc PCA, Glyceryl Caprate, Tocopherol, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Aluminium Tristearate, Magnesium Stearate, Oryzanol, Vanilla Planifolia Fruit Extract*                       

* from organic source

entry.title: Petit&Jolie Nourishing Cream 75ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Petit & Jolie
Type: Lotion
Price: 9.60

Petit&Jolie Oily Cream is a nourishing and moisturizing cream especially for the delicate (baby) skin. The cream offers extra care and protection due to the unique composition of, among other things, organically grown shea butter and almond oil. Oily Cream is very suitable for babies with dry or sensitive skin and can be used for both the face and the body.

All ingredients are of 100% natural origin. The cream therefore contains no parabens, paraffin, synthetic fragrances and dyes.

How to use: Apply to the baby’s skin or face daily. If the skin is getting better you can change to the bodylotion.

Ingredients: Aqua (Water), Glycerin, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Hybrid Oil*, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil*, Pentylene Glycol, Cetearyl Alcohol, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Almond) Oil*, Squalane, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter*, Cetyl Palmitate, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Polyglyceryl-3 Stearate, Palmitic Acid, Stearic Acid, Limnanthes Alba (Meadowfoam) Seed Oil, Sodium Polyphosphat, Jojoba Esters, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Wax, Acacia Decurrens Flower Wax, Polyglycerin-3, Tocopherol Dipotassium Glycyrrhizate, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Sodium Hyaluronate, Tocopherol, Sodium Levulinate, Xanthan Gum, Sodium Anisate, Parfum (Fragrance)**, Oryzanol

*organic source
**from natrural essential oils

entry.title: LUUV Deep Moisture Soft Plum Body Cream 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Lotion
Price: 19.50

Say hello to plum perfection – introducing delightful LUUV Natural Deeply Moisturizing Body Cream with Plum Oil! Infused with the nourishing goodness of plum oil and coconut oil, this cream brings balance and harmony to your skin’s moisture levels while warding off any external foes that dare to challenge your skin’s health! Let’s talk about the star ingredient: cold-pressed plum seed oil. Bursting with vitamins A, C, and E, it’s a powerhouse of nourishment for your skin. This oil is also packed with omega fatty acids that restore and replenish skin, leaving it feeling oh-so-soft and supple. And let’s not forget the delightful touch of cranberry extract, a powerful antioxidant that fights the signs of aging, giving your skin a youthful and radiant appearance.

With its foamy texture and fast absorption, this cream ensures that your skin feels pampered without any greasy residue or clogged pores. It’s a perfect match even for those with sensitive skin, providing gentle care and nourishment. So, let the enchanting aroma of plums dance around you as you embrace the joy of smooth, nourished, and glowing skin!

  • Light foamy texture
  • Deeply moisturizing
  • Quickly absorbing
  • Suitable for sensitive skin
  • Mild plum scent

natural | cruelty free | sustainable | paraben free | vegan

The product is made in Estonia

How to use: Suitable for everyday use. Apply cream to clean skin and rub in circular motions until absorbed.

Ingredients: Aqua, Cocos nucifera oil, Mangifera indica seed (Mango) butter, Polyglyceryl-3 Distearate, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Hydrolyzed wheat protein, Prunus domestica (Plum) seed oil, Cetyl alcohol, Vaccinium Macrocarpon fruit (Cranberry) extract, Triethyl Citrate, Glyceryl Caprylate, Benzoic Acid, Xanthan gum, Parfum, Mica, Titanium dioxide, CI 77491

entry.title: LUUV Nourishing and Protecting Honey Cream 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Lotion
Price: 15.60

This little jar of joy is here to transform your skincare routine into a blissful and nourishing experience. Imagine a velvety smooth cream that not only pampers your skin but also creates a natural shield against whatever life throws at it. With the power of beeswax, this cream becomes your skin’s ultimate superhero, protecting it from harsh water and challenging climates. No need to worry about dryness either, as it is also packed with the goodness of nourishing shea butter. And it’s not just about the benefits – the sweet aroma of honey is pure bliss for your body and senses.

With consistent use, watch as your skin transforms into a softer, smoother, and more resilient version of itself. It’s like unlocking the secret to youthful, radiant skin – you’ll be glowing with confidence! Tailored specifically for dry, very dry, and mature skin, this cream is here to turn your skincare routine into a joyful self-care ritual. It’s the perfect companion for those seeking an extra boost of hydration and love.

To top it all off, it carries the globally recognized ECOCERT / COSMOS certification. Feel confident knowing that you’re treating your skin to the finest, most natural ingredients out there. Your skin deserves this blissful treat, and you deserve to feel radiant and revitalized.

  • Silky and foamy texture
  • Deeply moisturizing
  • For dry and mature skin
  • Sweet honey aroma

natural | cruelty free | sustainable | certified

The product is made in Estonia

How to use: Suitable for everyday use. Apply cream to clean skin and rub in circular motions until absorbed.

Ingredients: Aqua, Cocos Nucifera Oil, Polyglyceryl-3 Distearate, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Glyceryl Stearate SE, Cera Alba (Beeswax), Glycerin, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Propolis (Bee glue) extract, Hippophae Rhamnoides Fruit Oil, Glyceryl Caprylate, Citrus Aurantium Dulcis (Orange) Oil, Xanthan Gum, Tocopherol, Triethyl Citrate, Benzoic Acid, Aroma, Citral, D-limonene, Linalool

entry.title: LUUV Energizing vitamin body cream 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Lotion
Price: 19.50

Enriched with the goodness of sea buckthorn, this body cream works wonders in softening and revitalizing your skin. Suitable for all skin types, it’s a true game-changer in your skincare routine. Indulge in the luxurious touch of mango butter as it effortlessly nourishes and hydrates, leaving your skin irresistibly silky and smooth.

Brace yourself for the true vitamin explosion from the sea buckthorn oil, packed with vitamins A and C. These powerful antioxidants work their magic, giving your skin the ultimate boost it deserves. At the same time, carrot oil restores vitality and radiance, giving your complexion a natural glow that’s simply breathtaking. Whether you have dry or oily skin, our body cream works wonders in balancing it out, all while keeping your pores clear and free. But the true magic happens when you look in the mirror – a beautiful, glowing complexion that radiates with vitality and health.

  • Light foamy texture
  • Softens and nourishes
  • For all skin types
  • Fresh citrus aroma

natural | cruelty free | sustainable | paraben free | vegan

The product is made in Estonia

How to use: Suitable for everyday use. Apply cream to clean skin and rub in circular motions until absorbed.

Ingredients: Aqua, Cocos Nucifera, Mangifera Indica seed (Mango) butter, Polyglyceryl-3 Distearate, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Cetyl Alcohol, Dunaliella Salina (Carrot) Extract, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Hippophae Rhamnoides (Sea buckthorn) oil, Citrus Nobilis (Mandarin oil), Citrus Aurantium (Orange oil), Triethylcitrate, Glyceryl Caprylate, Xanthan Gum, Benzoic Acid, Parfum, Limonene, Citral, Linalool

entry.title: LUUV Magnesium Cream 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Lotion
Price: 17.00

Introducing uplifting and rejuvenating LUUV Magnesium Cream – your gateway to a world of wellness and relaxation.  Certified with the prestigious ECOCERT/COSMOS eco-certificate, this Magnesium Cream is a trusted and sustainable choice for your well-being. With daily use, it becomes your partner in preventing and reducing magnesium deficiency, while providing relief from muscle aches and tensions. Harnessing the power of magnesium chloride, it offers a transdermal method of absorption, allowing your body to benefit from this vital mineral in the fastest and most efficient way. 

This cream is infused with the goodness of coconut oil, a natural emollient that closely resembles your skin’s own lipids. This dynamic duo ensures that even those with dry skin can absorb magnesium effectively, while providing deep hydration and nourishment. Plus, it’s suitable for even the most sensitive skin, ensuring a gentle and soothing experience for all. 

  • For everyday use
  • Prevents/reduces magnesium deficiency
  • Relieves muscle pain and tension
  • Moisturizing and nourishing
  • For the whole family
  • Suitable during pregnancy
  • ECOCERT/COSMOS
  • Beauty Shortlist Awards 2024- Wellbeing Category Gold medal

Key ingredients: 

  • Magnesium helps muscles to relax, muscle spasms are caused by lack of magnesium. Post-workout, transdermal magnesium is best because it’s topical (you apply it to the area that strained the muscles). There are no side effects when taking topical magnesium and the effect is immediate.
  • Coconut oil/coconut fat is the lightest of solid fats. With good absorption and blends well into the skin, nourishing but not heavy. Is very similar to the lipids in our own skin, so human skin absorbs it well.
  • Lemon essential oil is used to perfume the product, but it also has strong detox properties. Mild enough with a pleasant citrus scent. It is well suited for anti-cellulite products and for boosting the skin. Strengthens the immune system.

natural | cruelty free | sustainable | vegan | certified | paraben free

The product is made in Estonia

How to use: Magnesium cream is suitable for use by the whole family and is also safe for pregnant women to use. It wonderfully helps relieve muscle tension after exercise and prevents and reduces magnesium deficiency in the body. In children, it helps relieve discomfort caused by growing pains. The cream contains magnesium chloride, which is best absorbed through the skin and also the fastest way to reduce magnesium deficiency.

Ingredients: Aqua, Magnesium Chloride , Cocos Nucifera Oil, Polyglyceryl-3 Distearate, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate , Glyceryl stearate SE, Citrus Limon Peel (Lemon) Oil, Cymbopogon Flexuosus (Lemongrass) Oil, Mentha Piperita (Peppermint) Oil, Triethyl Citrate, Glyceryl Caprylate, Xanthan gum, Benzoic Acid, Citral, Limonene

entry.title: BERRICHI Body Cream Firming Touch 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Berrichi
Type: Lotion
Price: 31.90

Body Cream Firming Touch is a real caress from nature for your skin. Body Cream is designed for those who want to provide their skin with intensive care and hydration. This aromatic cream contains carefully selected natural ingredients that moisturise, nourish and improve skin elasticity. Caffeine, which acts as a natural stimulant, helps to reduce unevenness caused by cellulite and supports the efficient absorption of other active ingredients.

  • Mango and grapefruit fragrance
  • Reduces cellulite
  • Moisturises and deeply nourishes the skin
  • Alleviates dry skin problems
  • Makes skin silky soft

Main ingredients:

  • Furcellaran – antioxidant, helps to maintain skin moisture balance and strengthen the skin’s protective barrier, slows down the skin’s ageing process, reduces inflammation and dryness. Furtsellaran is obtained from algae grown in Estonian waters.
  • Astaxanthin – an antioxidant, the most effective natural anti-ageing agent with the ability to penetrate cell membranes, affecting the skin deeply. Stimulates the production of collagen, balances the skin’s moisture levels, protects the skin from central irritants.
  • Grapefruit oil – boosts energy levels, is anti-inflammatory and soothes dry skin, leaving it soft and healthy.
  • Babassu oil – protects the skin from external stressors, relieves roughness and scaling and has anti-inflammatory properties. Soothes dry skin and helps with eczema.
  • Barberry Thistle Oil – Deep moisturising and antioxidant properties, slows down ageing, soothes irritated skin and has anti-inflammatory properties.
  • Sea buckthorn oil – rich in antioxidants, moisturises the skin and supports its regeneration. Contains vitamin C and fatty acids, providing holistic skin care, plus anti-inflammatory properties.
  • Cocoa Butter – Pure cocoa butter is rich in fatty acids and deeply moisturises the skin as the fats in cocoa butter form a protective barrier to retain moisture.

    Suitable for all skin types.

    How to use: Apply a light layer of cream on clean skin, concentrating on dry areas. Suitable for everyday use. Allow the product to fully absorb before dressing.

    Ingredients: Organic Silybum Marianum (Milk Thistle) Seed Oil*, Organic Prunus Armeniaca (Apricot) Kernel Oil*, Euphorbia Cerifera Cera (Candelilla Wax), Caryodendron Orinocensa (Cacay) Seed Oil, Organic Oryza Sativa (Rice) Bran Oil*, Organic Theobroma Cacao Seed Butter*, Organic Orbignya Oleifera (Babassu) Seed Oil*, Haematococcus Pulvialis Oil, Astaxanthin, Tocopherol

    * Ingredients from organic farming

entry.title: SoKind Love Lines Emollient Stretch Mark Balm 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: SoKind
Type: Lotion
Price: 64.00

The consistency of Love Lines is loved by our customers and can best be described as an airy souffle. The clear effect on stretch marks, combined with the ability to ensure moisture and elasticity, makes Love Lines a product many customers return to again and again.

Naturally formulated Stretch Mark Balm with the effective, active ingredient Regestril™, which prevents and visibly repairs stretch marks.

Registril™, consisting of lima bean extracts and peptides, works by lightening pigmentation and repairing the skin in and around stretch marks, making them far less visible. At the same time, the peptides stimulate collagen production so that the firmness of the skin improves and repairs and smoothes the damaged tissue, which also makes the product perfect for cesarean sections.

Aloe vera, shea butter, and shorea butter ensure soft and well-moisturized skin and improve elasticity. SoKind has selected antioxidants from vitamin E and sea buckthorn, which have a healing effect and an anti-inflammatory effect on the stretch marks and the surrounding skin.

How to use: Apply generously to strech mark prone skin, morning and evening.

Ingredients: Aqua, Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe Vera) Leaf Juice*, Pentylene Glycol, Cetyl Palmitate, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Shorea Stenoptera (Sal) Seed Butter, Glycerin*, Cetyl Alcohol, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter*, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil*, Butylene Glycol, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Palmitoyl Tripeptide-1, Palmitoyl Tetrapeptide-7, Phaseolus Lunatus Seed Extract, Rutin, Caprylyl Glycol, Tocopherol, Hippophae Rhamnoides (Sea Buckthorn) Fruit Juice, Cetearyl Olivate, Xanthan Gum, Cetyl Hydroxyethylcellulose, Dipotassium Phosphate, Sorbitan Olivate, Sodium Gluconate, Citric Acid, Lactic Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate.

*organic ingredient

entry.title: SoKind Pure Kindness Repairing Multi-product 30ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: SoKind
Type: Lotion
Price: 42.00

A natural, preventive, and moisturizing multi-product that protects, heals, soothes, and rebuilds chapped, cracked, and dry skin anywhere on your own or your baby's skin.

It has been specially developed to be used in connection with breastfeeding as both a preventive and repairing nipple balm that does not need to be washed off before the baby is breastfed.

Pure Kindness is formulated with Nordic Saltwort, which is particularly known for its moisture-binding properties and ability to create a protective barrier. Saltwort helps to reduce redness and irritation and balances the skin's natural pH value while also having anti-inflammatory properties.

The Nordic Saltwort is combined with fatty acid-containing oils from Almonds and Avocado, which promote the skin's natural collagen production and protect and repair the skin.

How to use: Apply a small amount to the desired area and pat on gently. The balm can be reapplied as many times as needed. It is a leave-on balm and does not need to be washed off before nursing.

Ingredients: Ricinus Communis Seed Oil, Olus Oil, Oleic/Linoleic/Linolenic Polyglycerides, Persea Gratissima Oil, Cetyl Palmitate, Tribehenin, Butyrospermum Parkii Butter*, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Oil*, Salicornia Herbacea Extract, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Tocopheryl Acetate, Tocopherol

*organic ingredient

entry.title: Magrada Hydra Body Balm X Lauren Travel Size 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Lotion
Price: 16.90

Forget dry and dull skin - this replenishing body cream is true nutrient cocktail for dry skin. The exclusive combination of white peony and chamomile extracts soothes and protects the skin. Experience the gentle touches of sandalwood, pistachio, and almond notes, along with the delicate caresses of flowers.

How to use: Massage the cream on clean skin with gentle circular movements. Suitable for daily use.

Ingredients: Aqua, Caprylic/ Capric Triglyceride, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Polyglyceryl-3 Methylglucose Distearate, Glycerin, Carthamus Tinctorius (Safflower) Oil*, Prunus Armeniaca (Apricot) Kernel Oil*, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil*, Theobroma Cacao (Cocoa) Seed Butter, Glyceryl Stearate, Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Oil, Stearyl Alcohol, Parfum, Sodium Polyacrylate, Ethylhexyl Stearate, Paeonia Albiflora (White Peony) Flower Extract, Bellis Perennis (Daisy) Flower Extract, Pyrus Cydonia (Quince) Seed Extract, Citric Acid, Sodium Hyaluronate Crosspolymer, Polyglyceryl-4 Diisostearate/Polyhydroxystearate/Sebacate, Sodium Isostearate, Lecithin, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Tocopherol, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin

Ingredients of natural origin: 97,88%

paraben-free | sulphate-free | silicone-free | alcohol-free | vegan | EU allergen-free | cruelty-free | hand-made | with a minimal list of ingredients

entry.title: NURME Multipurpose Baby Balm 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Nurme
Type: Lotion
Price: 9.90

A multi-purpose balm created for your baby’s delicate skin. This emollient can be used on lips, face, body, or as diaper cream and massage balm, leaving skin pampered anywhere, anytime. The Baby Balm has been formulated following strict ECOCERT principles, using only organic ingredients and excluding any fragrance or chemical ingredients.

It is particularly indispensable during the winter season, when sleeping in a pram, walking or playing outdoors, the cold can often make a child’s skin red and rough. Baby Balm is nourishing and provides excellent protection against cold damage. 

In summer, a multi-action baby cream is helpful if the sun has made your toddler’s skin red or if mosquito bites itch and become inflamed. It’s also a great nappy cream – gentle and nourishing, it prevents and treats nappy rashes.

How to use:  Use in small quantities. Massage a small amount of Baby Balm carefully onto the desired area of the skin.

Ingredients: Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter*, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Oil, Tocopherol (Vitamin-E).

*Organic

entry.title: NURME Mild Baby Body Lotion 150ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Nurme
Type: Lotion
Price: 10.50

Baby skin is soft and delicate. It is more sensitive than adult skin and can easily become dry, painful, and flaky. Nurme baby series products, including the baby body lotion, help take care of your baby’s delicate skin.

Moisturizing and softening baby body milk is specially designed for delicate and sensitive skin. Body lotion is safe for everyday use because it is completely free of chemicals and fragrances. This protects the baby’s skin from dryness and flaking. Soothes the skin and supports its natural protective function.

Baby body milk is rich in vitamins and fats, which are important for keeping baby’s skin healthy. The fast-absorbing consistency ensures good absorption and makes it easy to apply.

How to use:  Apply a small amount of body milk, preferably after washing, to the desired area of ​​skin and rub gently with massaging movements until the body milk is absorbed.

Ingredients: Aqua, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil*, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil*, Butyrospermum Parkii*, Glyceryl Stearate, Glycerin, Theobroma Cacao (Cocoa) Seed Butter*, Coco Glucoside, Sucrose Stearate, Coconut Alcohol, Rosa Canina (Rosehip) Fruit Oil*, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Almond) Oil*, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice Powder*, Tocopherol, Xanthan Gum, Benzyl Alcohol, Dehydroacetic Acid. 80.87% Certified Organic Ingredients. 
*Organic.

entry.title: Vielö Organic Body Lotion Refill 500ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: vielö
Type: Lotion
Price: 70.00

Nourishing organic body lotion, specially designed to moisturise and soften dry and sensitive skin.

Created with organic whey (nourishing), wheat germ oil (protecting), hyaluronic acid (hydrating), organic extracts of calendula (regenerating), lavender (soothing) and sage (strengthening).

Suitable for all skin types.

By choosing sustainable refills you take good care of your skin and our planet.

How to use: Shake well before use. Apply to clean and dry skin. Massage in gently.

Ingredients: Lactis Serum Proteinum **, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil **, Triticum Vulgare Germ Oil **, Polyglyceryl-3 Dicitrate / Stearate *, Cetyl Alcohol *, Glycerin **, Betaine *, Aqua *, Citric Acid *, Xanthan Gum *, Tocopherol *, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Oil **, Sodium Hyaluronate *, Potassium Sorbate, Salvia Officinalis Oil **, Citronellol ** / ***, Pelargonium Graveolens Flower Oil **, Geraniol ** / ***, Polyglyceryl-4 Caprate *, Arnica Montana Flower Extract **, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Extract **, Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Extract **, Limonene ** / ***, Calendula Officinalis Flower Extract **, Salvia Officinalis Leaf Extract **, Sodium Lactate *, Citral ** / ***.

* from natural origin (99,8%)
** certified organic (89,7%)
*** from natural essential oils

Handmade in Austria

Inspired by circular economy, Vielö refines a high-quality by-product of cheese production, liquid organic whey, and uses it to create certified organic and sustainable skin and body care products.

entry.title: HOIA Baby Cream With Coconut 75ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: HOIA
Type: Baby Care
Price: 9.90

This body cream with especially soft texture is rich in unrefined shea butter, coconut oil, cocoa butter and other plant-based oils, which moisturize and protect your skin. Baby cream has anti-inflammatory properties and it helps to alleviate redness, flaky and dry skin leaving it soft and hydrated. This body cream is ideal for babies, pregnant women and for those with sensitive skin.

How to use: Apply it on skin and massage until its absorbed into your skin. Keep the product under +25 °C.

Ingredients: Organic Butyrospermum Parkii Butter (shea), Organic Cocos Nucifera Oil (coconut), Organic Thebroma Cacao Seed Butter (cocoa), Organic Prunus Armeniaca (apricot) Kernel Oil, Organic Rosa Canina (rosehip) Fruit Oil, Organic Camellina Sativa Seed Oil, Tocopherol (vitamin E).

Handmade in Saaremaa

entry.title: HOIA Baby Cream With Zinc 75ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: HOIA
Type: Baby Care
Price: 9.90

Whipped body cream for babies with especially soft texture is rich in unrefined shea butter, coconut oil, cocoa butter and other plant-based oils, which effectively moisturize and soften skin. This product alleviates flaky and dry skin, it contains natural zinc oxide, which helps to alleviate diaper rash, reduce redness and protect skin from environmental stress. Suitable for sensitive skin and babies.

How to use: Apply it on skin and massage until its absorbed into your skin. Keep the product under +25 °C.

Ingredients: *Butyrospermum Parkii (shea) Butter, *Cocos Nucifera (coconut) Oil, Zinc Oxide, *Theobroma Cacao (cacao) Seed Butter, *Prunus Armeniaca (apricot) Kernel Oil, *Rosa Canina (rosehip) Fruit Oil, *Camelina Sativa Seed oil, Tocopherol (E-vitamin).

*From organic farming.

Handmade in Saaremaa

entry.title: Magrada Firming Algae Body Serum With Plant Extracts, 35% 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Body Serum
Price: 27.90

The Lifting Complex is designed to fight against cellulite! The serum is suitable for daily use and contains the power of botanic ingredients, which help to make the skin firm, supple, and bright. The concentrated serum contains cornflower water and bog cranberry extract, known for its high vitamin C content. The product also contains horse chestnut and ginkgo tree extracts, which effectively fight cellulite. The rockweed extract contains rich amounts of sea minerals, has a moisturising effect, and helps to remove residues from the body. Although the serum with a light composition is absorbed quickly, the moisturized feeling remains on the skin for a long time.

  • Organic cornflower water acts as a blood supply activator. In addition, it has toning and complexion brightening properties, resulting in dewy and rested looking skin.
  • Organic horse chestnut extract has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The extract helps fight cellulite effectively by improving skin circulation.
  • Organic cranberry extract has skin tightening properties. Antioxidants and salicylic acid in cranberry give the skin youthfulness and radiance.
  • Ginkgo (leaf) extract has a rejuvenating effect on the skin. It helps reduce cellulite and soothe irritated skin.
  • Rockweed extract stimulates the turnover of skin cells, improving the overall look of the skin.

How to use: Apply the serum twice a day (in the morning and evening) on problematic areas: arms, belly, hips, buttocks, thighs, and knees. For a more powerful and longer-lasting effect, combine the serum with the anti-cellulite cream of the same line. It is recommended to use the product in the form of a treatment course.

Ingredients: Centaurea Cyanus (Cornflower) Flower Water*, Aqua, Glycerin, Polysorbate 20, Alcohol, Aesculus Hippocastanum (Horse Chestnut) Seed Extract*, Xanthan Gum, Vaccinium Macrocarpon (Cranberry) Fruit Extract*, Ginkgo Biloba (Maidenhair Tree) Leaf Extract, Fucus Vesiculosus (Bladderwrack) Extract, Parfum (Natural), Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Citric Acid, Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Benzoate

*COSMOS Organic Certified Ingredient

Ingredients of natural origin: 96%.

The list of ingredients may be changed. Please see the packaging for the updated and most accurate list of ingredients.

paraben-free | sulphate-free | silicone-free | vegan | EU allergen-free | cruelty-free | hand-made | with a minimal list of ingredients

entry.title: Magrada Firming Algae Body Cream With Plant Extracts 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Lotion
Price: 30.90

A caressing touch of the sea on your skin. The firming botanical complex is enriched with bladder wrack, horse chestnut, cranberry, ginkgo leaf and aloe extracts, which helps to extract water and toxins from the body, reduces cellulite, and firms the skin. The easily absorbing cream with a velvety texture is bursting with the freshness of crystal-clear sea water.A mixture of mimosa and earthy fragrance notes adds bright nuances to the natural aroma.

  • Rich in vitamin A, sweet almond oil softens dry skin by balancing moisture and water loss.
  • Organic horse chestnut extract has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The extract helps fight cellulite effectively by improving skin circulation.
  • Organic cranberry extract has skin tightening properties. Antioxidants and salicylic acid in cranberry give the skin youthfulness and radiance.
  • Ginkgo (leaf) extract has a rejuvenating effect on the skin. It helps reduce cellulite and soothe irritated skin.
  • Bladder wrack stimulates the turnover of skin cells, improving the overall look of the skin.
  • Sunflower seed oil is an incredibly rich source of natural vitamin E and essential fatty acids – omega-6 and omega-9. The light, nourishing oil is ideal for moisturizing, soothing and restoring the skin, resulting in a beautiful complexion.
  • Vitamin E protects the skin from environmental stressors, soothing and repairing its structure.

How to use: Apply the cream twice a day (in the morning and evening) on problematic areas: arms, belly, buttocks, thighs, and knees. It is recommended to use the cream in the form of a treatment course. Close carefully after use. Protect from direct sunlight.

Ingredients: Aqua, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Oil, Glycerin, Parfum (Natural), Sodium Polyacrylate, Glyceryl Citrate/Lactate/Linoleate/Oleate, Panthenol, Alcohol, Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe Vera) Extract, Lecithin, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Vaccinium Macrocarpon (Cranberry) Fruit Extract*, Ginkgo Biloba (Maidenhair Tree) Leaf Extract, Fucus Vesiculosus (Bladderwrack) Extract, Aesculus Hippocastanum (Horse Chestnut) Seed Extract*, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Benzoate

*COSMOS Certified Organic Ingredient

Ingredients of natural origin: 96.45%.

The list of ingredients may be changed. Please see the packaging for the updated and most accurate list of ingredients.

paraben-free | sulphate-free | silicone-free | vegan | EU allergen-free | cruelty-free | hand-made | with a minimal list of ingredients

entry.title: HEJ Organic Cherishing Body Lotion Cactus 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Hej
Type: Lotion
Price: 13.90

Cherishing Body Lotion is ideal. Its milky texture is easy to apply and absorbs quickly. The power ingredients from the prickly pear and the argan tree provide intensive and long-lasting moisture. In addition, the contained antioxidants protect your skin from harmful environmental influences. The body lotion can be used daily or as needed.

  • Provides intense moisture
  • Makes your body skin instantly baby soft
  • Leaves you with firm and elastic skin
  • Antioxidants protect and soothe your skin
  • Suitable for dehydrated skin

How to use: Apply after your shower and bath or as required and massage in. 

Ingredients: Aqua (Water), Opuntia Ficus-Indica Flower Extract [1], Glycine Soja (Soybean) Oil [1], Caprylic/capric Triglyceride, Olea Europaea Fruit Oil [1], Argania Spinosa (Argan) Kernel Oil [1], Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Oil [1], Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter [1], Isoamyl Laurate, Hydrogenated Coco-Glycerides, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Glycerin, Citrus Paradisi Fruit Extract [1], Opuntia Ficus-Indica Seed Oil [1], Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil [1], Amorphophallus Konjac Root Powder, Lysolecithin, Levulinic Acid, Acacia Senegal Gum, Xanthan Gum. Tocopherol, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Glyceryl Caprylate, P-Anisic Acid, Perfume (Fragrance) [2], Citral [2], Citronellol [2], Limonene [2], Linalool [2] 1. from controlled organic agriculture 2. from natural essential oils

Organic | Cruelty Free | Vegan | Natural Resources

entry.title: Magrada Hydra Body Balm X Lauren 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Lotion
Price: 33.50

Forget dry and dull skin - this replenishing body cream is true nutrient cocktail for dry skin. The exclusive combination of white peony and chamomile extracts soothes and protects the skin. Experience the gentle touches of sandalwood, pistachio, and almond notes, along with the delicate caresses of flowers.

How to use: Massage the cream on clean skin with gentle circular movements. Suitable for daily use.

Ingredients: Aqua, Caprylic/ Capric Triglyceride, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Polyglyceryl-3 Methylglucose Distearate, Glycerin, Carthamus Tinctorius (Safflower) Oil*, Prunus Armeniaca (Apricot) Kernel Oil*, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil*, Theobroma Cacao (Cocoa) Seed Butter, Glyceryl Stearate, Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Oil, Stearyl Alcohol, Parfum, Sodium Polyacrylate, Ethylhexyl Stearate, Paeonia Albiflora (White Peony) Flower Extract, Bellis Perennis (Daisy) Flower Extract, Pyrus Cydonia (Quince) Seed Extract, Citric Acid, Sodium Hyaluronate Crosspolymer, Polyglyceryl-4 Diisostearate/Polyhydroxystearate/Sebacate, Sodium Isostearate, Lecithin, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Tocopherol, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin

Ingredients of natural origin: 97,88%

paraben-free | sulphate-free | silicone-free | alcohol-free | vegan | EU allergen-free | cruelty-free | hand-made | with a minimal list of ingredients

entry.title: Magrada Jasmine Body Cream With Black Elderberry Extract 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Lotion
Price: 23.90

Bring mystique into your beauty routine. Jasmine – the flower of beauty, happiness, and love – plus seven organic plant oils leave your skin radiant and glowing. The body lotion with a sensual floral aroma softens and nourishes the skin and maintains its moisture balance. Organic black elderberry extract adds additional value with its powerful antioxidant properties. The body lotion is meant for the daily moisturisation of dry ageing skin.

  • The organic black elderberry extract calms irritated skin and has potent antioxidative and anti-irritation properties.
  • Vitamin E protects the skin from environmental stressors by calming the skin and improving its structure.
  • Hyaluronic acid has a high water-binding capacity, which results in excellently hydrated skin.

The scent of jasmine comes from the natural petals of the flower and has been captured into the bottle in France. The alluring flower oil is custom-made.

How to use: Massage the body cream with light circular movements into clean skin. Suitable for everyday use. Store in tightly closed original packaging. Protect from direct sunlight.

Ingredients: Aqua, Caprylic/ Capric Triglyceride, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Polyglyceryl-3 Methylglucose Distearate, Glycerin, Carthamus Tinctorius (Safflower) Oil*, Prunus Armeniaca (Apricot) Kernel Oil*, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil*, Theobroma Cacao (Cocoa) Seed Butter, Glyceryl Stearate, Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Oil, Stearyl Alcohol, Parfum (Natural), Sodium Polyacrylate, Ethylhexyl Stearate, Pyrus Cydonia (Quince) Seed Extract, Sambucus Nigra (Elderberry) Fruit Extract*, Sodium Hyaluronate Crosspolymer, Polyglyceryl-4 Diisostearate/Polyhydroxystearate/Sebacate, Sodium Isostearate, Lecithin, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Tocopherol, Citric Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin

*COSMOS Certified Organic Ingredient

Ingredients of natural origin: 98,06%.

The list of ingredients may be changed. Please see the packaging for the updated and most accurate list of ingredients.
